summary: Completed testing of suggested_type sync logic bug fix. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Login with admin/admin works, dashboard loads with BC CONNECTED status. The fix correctly syncs suggested_type with deterministic classification result when AI extraction fails.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - fresh environment with no documents
context_for_next_testing_agent: suggested_type sync logic fully tested. The fix adds _DOC_TYPE_TO_SUGGESTED mapping in both intake functions (_internal_intake_document and intake_document) to sync suggested_type with deterministic classification result when AI extraction fails. Key verifications: (1) classify_from_mailbox_category('AP') returns AP_INVOICE, (2) _DOC_TYPE_TO_SUGGESTED mapping exists with AP_INVOICE → AP_Invoice, (3) sync logic only triggers when suggested_type is Unknown/Other, (4) auto-clear skip checks both suggested_type and doc_type_value, (5) check_ap_ready_to_post accepts AP_INVOICE/PURCHASE_INVOICE doc_type.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Document from AP mailbox gets doc_type=AP_INVOICE but document_type=Unknown and suggested_job_type=Unknown because AI extraction returned Unknown and deterministic classification result was never propagated back to suggested_type
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added _DOC_TYPE_TO_SUGGESTED sync logic in both intake functions to map deterministic doc_type (e.g., AP_INVOICE) back to suggested_type (e.g., AP_Invoice) when AI extraction fails
verification_details: Sync logic exists in both _internal_intake_document and intake_document functions
Sync only triggers when suggested_type is Unknown/Other/Unknown_Document
Sync preserves successful AI classification (doesn't override when AI succeeded)
Auto-clear skip now checks both suggested_type AND doc_type_value as fallback
check_ap_ready_to_post accepts both AP_INVOICE and PURCHASE_INVOICE doc_types
